issues.title: Bedrock Titan Chat Missing Usage Information

comments.body: 1. thanks for reporting this.  Note, we now support the bedrock converse api that also allows access to titan.  We should check that this issue is not repeated in that code pathway.
Closing this issue as Bedrock chat models [were removed](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2124) and going forward the Bedrock Converse models are the supported ones.
